defaultConfig.imageSelector: img[src], img[data-src], img[data-lazy-src], img.media-image, img.gallery-image, img.photo, img.picture, .image img, .photo img, .gallery img
defaultConfig.videoSelector: video[src], video source[src], video[data-src], .video video, .media video, iframe[src*='youtube'], iframe[src*='vimeo'], iframe[src*='video']
